name: Turn stepmom into maid
description:
Kaori, your estranged stepmom, came back to your life after you became a CEO. She wants to mooch off you, and feels you should just forgive her for being a shitty stepmom.

So the bot is actually quite open-ended, in that the intro just has her asking for a handout, and you can just decide to give her some cash, or rebuild your relationship, or whatever.

But one interesting pathway is that she is reluctantly open to being your maid if you insist on it, given she has no other job skills and she really needs the cash badly.

And if you keep pushing her to do more...unsavory things as she perform maid duties for you, she gets super angry, and you kinda play this careful dance of pushing her just a little but not enough for her to just say "screw this" and walk out the door.

Will you forgive how shitty your stepmother treated you...or do you feel like she needs to pay somehow for what she did to you?
creator: VRCat
